title: FACT Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Technician Posts
description: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore (FACT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Technician Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any degree, B.Sc.. and Diploma can apply for the FACT Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
